metadata.timeBudget: Save ~7:17 to break 1:08. Plan targets ~9 min of upside.
trainingFocus: Compromised running — especially after sandbag lunges (Run 7: 5:18) and burpees (Run 4: 5:03)
Sandbag lunge endurance — unbroken sets at race load
Wall ball capacity — sub 4:10, ideally unbroken or 30/20
Run economy at 4:10/km Hyrox target pace
Transition speed — sub-30s into/out of stations

changelog.notes: Added 15-min aerobic finishers to all S1/S4 strength sessions (excl. test/taper/race weeks). S1=SkiErg/Bike, S4=Row. Phase-progressive intensity. Strength sessions extended 60→75 min.

Rewrote 26 strength-day finishers as mixed-modal conditioning: For Time, AMRAP, EMOM, sandwiches, Death-by, ladders. One unique finisher per week within each phase. Monolithic single-erg pieces replaced.

Trimmed warmups/cooldowns across active weeks (W1-3, 5-7, 9-11, 13-15) to 2-line focused versions. Added core triplet finishers to all hybrid sessions to bring main work density up from ~26 to ~32 min.

phases.name: Base
phases.focus: Aerobic base · strength accumulation · station technique

phases.name: Build
phases.focus: Threshold work · heavier strength · compromised-run drills

phases.name: Race-Specific
phases.focus: Full Hyrox sims · race-load stations · sharp running

phases.name: Taper
phases.focus: Volume down · intensity held · race week

weeks.theme: Anchor week. Wake up the systems, lock in technique, no grinders.

sessions.title: Lower Strength — Squat Foundation
sessions.intent: Set baseline squat volume. Quality reps over loads.

blocks.name: DB Walking Lunge
blocks.note: Slow control. This is your sandbag-lunge insurance.

blocks.name: For Time — Row + Ski + Push-Ups
blocks.note: Z3 effort. Steady, not a sprint. First round sets the tone.

sessions.title: Easy Aerobic Run
sessions.intent: Build the engine. Conversational only.

blocks.name: Continuous easy run
blocks.note: RPE 4. Nose-breathe if you can.

blocks.name: Strides
blocks.note: Smooth, fast, relaxed. Not all-out.

sessions.title: Hybrid — Run + Wall Ball Drills
sessions.intent: Teach the legs to run after wall ball burn. Negative-split mandate.

blocks.name: 5 rounds
blocks.note: Target round time within 15s window. Hold the 5th.

blocks.name: Anti-Rotation Stiff Core
blocks.note: Stiff core protects sandbag-lunge position.

sessions.title: Upper Strength — Press + Pull
sessions.intent: Build upper push and pull base. Carry-over to SkiErg & Row.

blocks.name: Pendlay Row
blocks.note: Dead-stop on floor each rep.

blocks.name: Pull-ups
blocks.note: Leave 1 rep in the tank.

blocks.name: For Time — Row + Run + Wall Balls
blocks.note: Try to keep wall balls unbroken.

sessions.title: Tempo Run
sessions.intent: First taste of threshold. Controlled.

blocks.name: 4 × 5 min @ threshold
blocks.note: Should feel hard-but-controlled. RPE 7.

sessions.title: Mini Hyrox Sim
sessions.intent: Rehearse the format at sub-max effort. Smooth transitions, no racing.

blocks.name: 4 rounds, continuous
blocks.note: Hold even effort. Don't race. Practice transitions sub 30s.

blocks.name: Front-Rack BB Lunge
blocks.note: Front rack — taxes core like sandbag.

blocks.name: AMRAP 12 — Ski + KB + Burpees
blocks.scheme: As many rounds as possible in 12 min
blocks.note: Sustainable pace. Aim 5–7 rounds. Last round, empty.

sessions.title: Hybrid — Run + Burpee Broad Jump
sessions.intent: Direct hit on your 2nd-weakest combo (Run 4 after burpees at Malaga).

blocks.name: 5 rounds
blocks.note: Stand tall every burpee. No half jumps.

blocks.name: Core EMOM 5
blocks.note: Top off the trunk.

blocks.name: AMRAP 12 — Row + WB + Run
blocks.scheme: As many rounds as possible in 12 min
blocks.note: Aim 4–5 rounds. Honest row split.

blocks.name: 4 rounds continuous
blocks.note: Smooth and steady. No racing.

weeks.theme: Peak base week. Highest volume of phase, then we test.

blocks.name: EMOM 14 — Ski / Bodyweight Alt.
blocks.note: Each minute starts on the bell. Rest is whatevers left of the minute.

sessions.title: Long Z2 Run
sessions.intent: Aerobic capacity build. Stay easy.

blocks.name: Continuous easy
blocks.note: Conversational. HR <75% max.

sessions.title: Hybrid Triple — Run + WB + Burpee
sessions.intent: Compound the two weakest stations + run.

blocks.name: 6 rounds
blocks.scheme: 500m run + 25 wall balls + 8 burpee broad jumps · 90s rest
blocks.note: Pace this. Round 6 should match round 1.

blocks.name: Core Triplet
blocks.note: Quick core cap. Hold the plank tight.

blocks.name: 5 RFT — Row + Wall Balls
blocks.note: Unbroken wall balls every round.

sessions.title: Hill Repeats
sessions.intent: Power for sled push + strength-endurance for hard runs.

blocks.name: 8 × 90s steep hill
blocks.note: Drive knees, arms. 4-6% grade.

sessions.title: Half Hyrox @ Race Load
sessions.intent: First true rehearsal at race loads. Conservative pace.

weeks.theme: TEST WEEK. Volume down. Three benchmarks.

sessions.title: Prime — Light Squat + Bench
sessions.intent: Sharpen, don't tire. Loads 75% only.

blocks.name: TEST: 3RM Back Squat
blocks.scheme: Up to 3 working sets to find true 3RM
blocks.note: Log the heaviest clean 3. Update backSquat1RM = 3RM × 1.07 in Settings if new PB.

testProtocol.instructions: Record weight, then update backSquat1RM in Settings (3RM × 1.07 ≈ 1RM).

blocks.name: Full mobility flow
blocks.note: Hips, T-spine, ankles.

blocks.name: TEST: 5K all out
blocks.note: Even splits or slight negative. This sets thresholdPace going forward.

testProtocol.instructions: After test: thresholdPaceSecPerKm ≈ 5K pace + 10-15 sec/km. Update Settings.

sessions.title: TEST — Half Hyrox Sim
sessions.intent: The big benchmark. All splits captured.

testProtocol.instructions: SCREENSHOT your watch summary + log in Tests tab. Send to Claude in chat for plan refresh.

weeks.theme: Phase shift. Heavier strength, threshold runs, drilling compromised running.

sessions.title: Lower — Squat Top Set + Back Off

blocks.name: Heavy DB Walking Lunge
blocks.note: Loaded lunge work is non-negotiable for you.

blocks.name: For Time — Ski 1k + 30 WB + Ski 1k
blocks.note: Sandwich. Pace the first ski. Second ski with cooked arms — thats the point.

blocks.name: 3 × 10 min @ threshold
blocks.note: Hold the third rep.

sessions.title: Compromised Run — Lunge → Run
sessions.intent: THE priority session. Run-off-lunge is your biggest weakness.

blocks.name: 5 rounds
blocks.note: First run will feel awful. Round 5 should match round 1. This is your race day.

blocks.name: Anti-Rotation Stiff Core
blocks.note: Stiff core protects sandbag-lunge position.

blocks.name: For Time — 2000m Row
blocks.scheme: Single piece for time · pacing test
blocks.note: Even pacing. First 500m feels easy, last 500m push. Compare to Wk 8 test.

blocks.name: 8 × 800m @ Hyrox target pace
blocks.note: Goal: every rep at 4:10/km flat. This is THE race-winning pace.

sessions.title: Half Hyrox @ Race Load — Smooth
sessions.intent: Race rehearsal: focus stations 2-4 of race (sled pull → burpees → row).

weeks.theme: Push the lunge-run combo. Volume slightly up on intervals.

blocks.name: Sandbag-Style Carries (Bear Hug)
blocks.note: Race-load sandbag bear-hug carries. Builds the holding position.

blocks.name: AMRAP 12 — Ski + Burpees + KB
blocks.scheme: As many rounds as possible in 12 min
blocks.note: Aim 5–6 rounds.

sessions.title: Compromised Run — Burpee → Run
sessions.intent: Drilling Run 4 of Hyrox (post-burpee).

blocks.name: 6 rounds
blocks.note: Calm breathing on burpees — keep next 50m runnable.

blocks.name: Core EMOM 5
blocks.note: Top off the trunk.

blocks.name: Heavy Farmers Carry
blocks.note: Race-load farmers. Already a strength — maintain.

blocks.name: AMRAP 12 — Row + WB + Run
blocks.scheme: As many rounds as possible in 12 min
blocks.note: Aim 5+ rounds.

blocks.name: 6 × 1000m @ Hyrox target pace
blocks.note: Goal: every km within 5s of 4:10.

blocks.name: 4 rounds
blocks.note: Slightly longer runs = run-economy stress at race load.

weeks.theme: Highest volume of Build. Then we deload-test.

blocks.name: 5 RFT — Ski + Run + BBJ
blocks.note: Drilling BBJ → run transition. Every round.

blocks.name: 4 × (5 min threshold + 1 min @ 5K)
blocks.note: Surge is at 5K pace.

sessions.title: Compromised Run — Wall Ball → Run
sessions.intent: Final station fatigue carries into Run 8. Train it.

blocks.name: 5 rounds
blocks.note: 30/0 or 20/10 split — find a sustainable pattern. Then RUN.

blocks.name: Core Triplet
blocks.note: Quick core cap. Hold the plank tight.

blocks.name: DB Snatch
blocks.note: Hyrox-style alternating snatch. Hip drive.

blocks.name: 5 RFT — Row + Wall Balls
blocks.note: Unbroken wall balls. Target row 1:55/500m.

blocks.name: 400-800-1200-800-400 @ Hyrox pace
blocks.note: Ladder simulates varying pacing demands within the race.

sessions.title: 6-Station Hyrox Sim
sessions.intent: First 75% of full Hyrox. All stations at race load.

blocks.name: Back Squat
blocks.note: Bar speed. Don't grind.

testProtocol.instructions: Update row2KSplit and ski1KSplit in Settings (per-500m avg).

sessions.title: TEST — Half Hyrox Sim
sessions.intent: Second benchmark sim. Compare to Week 4.

testProtocol.instructions: SCREENSHOT + log in Tests tab. Send to Claude for Plan v3 update.

weeks.theme: Phase shift. VO2 max work + Olympic lift power + race-pace stations.

blocks.name: Power Clean
blocks.note: Speed under the bar. Catch in quarter squat.

blocks.name: Walking Lunge w/ Sandbag
blocks.note: Bear hug carry into lunge. Race position.

blocks.name: 21-15-9 For Time — Ski + Row + Burpees
blocks.note: Classic triplet. Hard from the gun.

blocks.name: 5 × 4 min @ 5K-3K pace
blocks.note: Hard but controlled. RPE 8-9.

sessions.title: Race-Pace Hybrid — Run + WB + Lunge
sessions.intent: Race intensity. All your big-3 weaknesses chained.

blocks.name: 4 rounds
blocks.scheme: 600m run + 25 wall balls + 10m sandbag lunges · 2 min rest
blocks.note: Race pace throughout. This IS your race.

blocks.name: Anti-Rotation Stiff Core
blocks.note: Stiff core protects sandbag-lunge position.

blocks.name: Row 1k → 50 WB → Row 1k
blocks.note: First row at race split. WB broken. Second row whatever you have left.

blocks.name: 20 min @ marathon pace
blocks.note: Aerobic stress without threshold burn.

sessions.title: Full Hyrox 75% — Race-Load Sim
sessions.intent: Six stations at race load with race-pace runs. Hardest workout of phase.

weeks.theme: VO2 ceiling + power. Highest intensity week.

blocks.name: AMRAP 12 — Ski + Row + BBJ
blocks.scheme: As many rounds as possible in 12 min
blocks.note: Aim 5+ rounds. BBJ technique stays clean under fatigue.

blocks.name: 12 × 400m @ 3K pace
blocks.note: Smooth speed. Don't blow rep 4.

blocks.name: Core EMOM 5
blocks.note: Top off the trunk.

blocks.name: 8 × 500m Row @ Race Split
blocks.note: Below your goal 2k split. Race-pace lock-in.

blocks.name: 8 × 1000m @ Hyrox target
blocks.note: Tight cluster. Every km under 4:12.

blocks.name: Back Squat
blocks.note: Heaviest session of peak. Quality only.

blocks.name: Death by Ski Calories
blocks.scheme: Min 1: 1 cal · Min 2: 2 cal · ... until you fail to finish in time
blocks.note: Most people fail around minute 13–15. Mental more than physical.

sessions.title: Race-Pace Hybrid — Wall Ball Capacity
sessions.intent: Big wall ball session. 100 reps in 4 sets.

blocks.name: 4 rounds
blocks.note: Unbroken wall ball every round. That's the goal.

blocks.name: Core Triplet
blocks.note: Quick core cap. Hold the plank tight.

blocks.name: BB Snatch (Power)
blocks.note: Power snatch, not full. Hip drive practice.

blocks.name: AMRAP 12 — Row + WB + BBJ
blocks.scheme: As many rounds as possible in 12 min
blocks.note: Race-specific triplet. Aim 4 rounds or more.

sessions.title: FULL HYROX SIM — First
sessions.intent: First full 8-station Hyrox at sub-max effort. Get the feel of length.

blocks.name: Full Hyrox @ ~85% effort
blocks.note: FIRST FULL SIM. Don't race. Get the feel. Log splits.

weeks.theme: TEST WEEK 3. Calibrate before race-specific phase.

testProtocol.instructions: Compare to Week 4 test. Update thresholdPaceSecPerKm if pace improved.

sessions.title: TEST — FULL HYROX SIM
sessions.intent: Big day. Full Hyrox at race effort. Predicts race time within 1-2 minutes.

testProtocol.instructions: BIG SCREENSHOT moment. Capture everything. Send to Claude. Plan v4 will be tuned to your actual gaps from this sim.

weeks.theme: Phase shift. Every session has race specificity. Maintain strength, sharpen running, drill stations.

sessions.title: Strength Maintenance + Sandbag
sessions.intent: Strength stays. Volume drops, intensity holds.

blocks.name: Sandbag Lunges (race load)
blocks.note: Race-load only from now on.

blocks.name: Hyrox Triplet × 3 RFT
blocks.scheme: 3 rounds for time · race effort · target 11–13 min
blocks.note: Run after WB and BBJ — your two weakest combos from Malaga.

sessions.title: Compromised Run — All Three
sessions.intent: Drill all 3 race-day combos that hurt you. Lunge-run, Burpee-run, WB-run.

blocks.name: 3 sets
blocks.scheme: [10m sandbag lunge + 400m run]+[10 BBJ + 400m run]+[20 wall balls + 400m run] · 3 min rest between SETS
blocks.note: Each set is 30m lunge + 30 burpees + 60 wall balls + 1200m. Pace it.

blocks.name: Anti-Rotation Stiff Core
blocks.note: Stiff core protects sandbag-lunge position.

blocks.name: Row 4 × 500m
blocks.note: Push these. Target Row split: 1:55.

blocks.name: 100 Wall Balls For Time
blocks.scheme: 100 reps · any breakdown · target sub 7 min
blocks.note: Capacity test. Try 30/30/20/20 or 25 × 4. Find what works.

blocks.name: 3 × (5 min threshold + 3 min Hyrox pace)
blocks.note: Surge to Hyrox target pace for 3 min.

sessions.title: Full Hyrox @ Race Effort
sessions.intent: Full Hyrox at 95% effort. Practice nutrition, transitions, mental cues.

blocks.name: FULL Hyrox

items: Full race order: SkiErg → SledPush → SledPull → BBJ → Row → Farmers → SandbagLunges → WallBalls

blocks.note: Wear race kit. Use race fueling. Test mental cues.

weeks.theme: Sharpen running. Hold strength. Top week of race-specific volume.

blocks.name: Ski Sandwich — 800 + 30 BBJ + 800
blocks.note: BBJ in the middle. The second ski with destroyed legs is the lesson.

sessions.title: Race-Day Triple Block
sessions.intent: Simulate the end of race — final 3 stations.

blocks.name: 2 sets
blocks.scheme: [200m Farmers + 1km run + 50m Sandbag Lunge + 1km run + 50 Wall Balls + 1km run] · 5 min rest between
blocks.note: This is the back half of the race. The set with no break.

blocks.name: Core EMOM 5
blocks.note: Top off the trunk.

blocks.name: SkiErg @ race pace
blocks.note: Target your goal Ski split exactly.

blocks.name: 2 × (1k Row + 25 WB)
blocks.scheme: 2 rounds for time · 2 min rest between · target 12–14 min
blocks.note: Race-effort row. WB capacity.

blocks.name: 5 × (800m @ Hyrox pace + 30s surge @ 5K pace)
blocks.note: Practice race-day surges out of transitions.

sessions.title: Full Hyrox — Top Effort
sessions.intent: Hardest sim of training. Predict race-day output.

blocks.name: FULL HYROX — 95% effort
blocks.scheme: Standard race order, race loads, race fuel

load.value: Goal: get under 1:10. Sub 1:09 = on track for 1:08.

weeks.theme: Sharpen further. Volume comes down 15%. Intensity stays.

blocks.name: Sandbag Lunge (race load)
blocks.note: Race-distance reps.

blocks.name: Sharp Triplet × 3 — Race Pace
blocks.scheme: 3 rounds for time · race effort · target 10–12 min
blocks.note: Race-day pace and movements. Crisp transitions.

blocks.name: 6 × 1000m @ Hyrox pace
blocks.note: Short rest = simulates race transition recovery.

sessions.title: Race-Day Simulation — First 4 Stations
sessions.intent: Drill the opening half at race intensity.

blocks.name: Half Hyrox — first 4 stations
blocks.note: Capture splits. Should feel under control.

blocks.name: Core Triplet
blocks.note: Quick core cap. Hold the plank tight.

blocks.name: 30-20-10 For Time — Row + WB + KB
blocks.note: Last set hurts. Thats the work.

sessions.title: Half Hyrox — Race Pace, Back 4
sessions.intent: Drill the back half. Where races are won or lost.

blocks.name: Back 4 stations at race load + pace
blocks.note: These are the stations that broke you last race. Now you own them.

weeks.theme: TEST WEEK 4. Last big test. Then taper.

testProtocol.instructions: Update thresholdPace and row2KSplit. Compare progress vs Week 8/12.

sessions.title: TEST — FINAL FULL HYROX
sessions.intent: Last sim before race. Should be within 1-2 min of race target.

blocks.name: TEST: FULL HYROX @ race effort
blocks.scheme: Full race order, full loads, race fuel + kit

load.value: Goal time: 1:09 or better = sub 1:08 race is on

testProtocol.instructions: FINAL TEST. SCREENSHOT EVERYTHING. Send to Claude. We use this for the taper plan + race-day pacing strategy.

blocks.name: Easy Triplet × 3 — Z2
blocks.note: Movement only. HR stays low.

blocks.name: 3 rounds (race effort, full rest)
blocks.scheme: 20 wall balls + 400m run + 10m sandbag lunge + 400m run · 3 min full recovery
blocks.note: FAST. Full rest. Quality only.

blocks.name: Easy Triplet × 3 — Z2
blocks.note: Loose, easy. Just movement.

sessions.title: Half Hyrox — Sharpener
sessions.intent: Last sim. Race effort, race fuel, race kit.

weeks.theme: Taper week 2. Volume −45%. Stay sharp, don't tire.

sessions.title: Pre-Race Tune-Up
sessions.intent: Short race-pace tune. Mind-body activation.

blocks.name: Pre-race tune
blocks.scheme: 2 × (1km run + 500m SkiErg + 30m Sled Push + 1km run) · 3 min rest
blocks.note: Activation, not exhaustion.

weeks.theme: RACE WEEK. Minimal load. Maximum sharpness. Trust the work.

blocks.name: Sled Push (race load)
blocks.note: Get a feel. Don't tire.

blocks.name: 4 × 400m @ Hyrox pace
blocks.note: Crisp. Easy after.

blocks.name: Transition rehearsal
blocks.scheme: 5 × dummy transitions (run → station entry → run out)

load.value: Practice only. Feel race kit, fuel timing, mental cues.

blocks.name: Easy walk-jog
blocks.note: Loosen up. Hydrate. Carb load complete. Race kit laid out.

sessions.title: RACE DAY — HYROX MALAGA/EU
sessions.intent: Sub 1:08. Execute the plan.
warmup: 60 min before: easy walk + dynamic warmup
30 min before: 8 min progressive jog + 3 × 100m strides
10 min before: 5 BBJ + 5 wall balls + 30m sled push (light) — feel the floor

blocks.name: RACE: 8 × (1km + station)
blocks.scheme: Even pacing. Sub 4:10/km on the runs.

items: Stations: target sled push 2:40, wall balls 4:00 unbroken if possible

testProtocol.instructions: Send race result screenshot to Claude — we'll plan the next cycle.
